[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000100001 2
5 0000110000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000010000 1

01 0000000101 2
12 0010011000 3
23 0000000001 1
34 0000100010 2
45 1101000100 4
56 0000010000 1 match 7
67 1000000000 1
70 0001001000 2

02 0010000100 2
13 0010001000 2

57 0000010000 1 match 7
